_comment_minimumReleaseAge: Delay PRs for packages published less than 7 days ago (XZ-style attack protection)
_comment_schedule: Open update PRs on Monday mornings to batch review
_comment_lockFileMaintenance: Weekly PR to update lockfile within declared semver ranges

packageRules._comment: Automerge devDependencies patch and minor versions
Group all patch updates into a single PR
Scope rules for security-sensitive packages - no minimumReleaseAge override

_comment_prConcurrentLimit: Limit concurrent Renovate PRs to avoid overwhelming reviewers
_comment_labels: Add labels to Renovate PRs for easy filtering
